phrases.example: I tend to prioritize clarity over speed in communication.
In practice, that means I write short weekly summaries.
A concrete example is when I resolved a conflict between teams.
Looking back, I would align earlier on success criteria.
It depends on the context—deadlines and risk matter.
My reasoning is that quality builds trust.

phrases.text: If I had to choose, I would…
phrases.example: If I had to choose, I would prioritize impact.
